frozen_reviewer_resolved.gold_policy: frozen-excerpt correctness uses reviewer-approved adjudication decisions only; production-source review is reported separately; candidate, pending, and production-source-only values are excluded from frozen correctness denominators

evidence_scopes.production_source_review_scope: shadow operational review; never inserted into frozen-excerpt accuracy denominators

safety_gates.note: Publishability mismatch counts require reviewer-resolved document-kind gold; pending cases are not scored as safe or erroneous.

field_presence_precision.reason: No reviewer-resolved predicted-present samples for provider.

normalized_exact_match.reason: No jointly present reviewer-resolved samples for provider.

deterministic_fields: explicit primary application window with embedded offset/timezone
lifecycle derivation from unambiguous start/deadline/timezone for a confirmed recruitment opportunity at fixed as_of
llm_assisted_candidates: complex date roles and process timeline
complex Korean eligibility and exceptions outside P0
human_review_required: lifecycle when date roles or timezone are ambiguous, dates conflict, multiple cycles are possible, or correction/extension/result relations are required
schema_expressiveness_gaps: lifecycle status has no enum and currently accepts document-kind values
tiered, composite, recurring, hourly, applicant-requested, and multi-program amounts do not fit one amountValue
host institution and benefit type are optional and absent from the baseline output
input_minimization: use HTML when it already contains P0 facts
require full HWP/HWPX parsing only when P0 is absent from accessible HTML
use minimal OCR/vision for image-only program, primary application window, amount, and application path
defer detailed eligibility and follow-up procedure semantics to LLM-assisted draft plus administrator review

evidence_references.source_text: 2025학년도 2학기 학생처특별장학금 신청 안내. 직전학기 이수학점 15학점 이상 및 평점평균 3.5 이상인 재학생. 신청방법: 포털 로그인 후 등록/장학 → 장학 → 장학금 신청.
